Title: Hannover, Emil
Overview: Historian of Danish art. In 1925 Bernard Rackham translated his Keramisk haandbog into English.
Selected Bibliography: Dänische Kunst des 19. Jahrhunderts. Geschichte der modernen Kunst 7. Leipzig: Seemann, 1907; Svensk kunst, nogle gruntræk av dens karakter. Copenhagen: Guldendalske Boghandel, 1916; Det nittende aarhundredes kunst, skikkelser og strømninger. Copenhagen: Gyldendal, Nordisk forlag, 1918; Keramisk haandbog. 2 vols in 3. Copenhagen: H. Koppels Forlag, 1919-1924, English, Pottery & Porcelain: a Handbook for Collectors. 3 vols. London: E. Benn, limited, 1925.
